title: Flow Lemon Floor & Surface All Purpose Cleaner | Concentrate Formula | Interior & Exterior | Safe On All Surfaces (5 Litre)
features: HIGHLY EFFECTIVE CLEANING: The Lemon Floor All Purpose Cleaner is specially formulated to tackle a wide range of cleaning tasks. With its refreshing lemon scent, this cleaner not only leaves your floors sparkling clean but also imparts a pleasant fragrance throughout your home or workspace.

SAFE FOR ALL SURFACES: This all-purpose cleaner is designed to remove dirt, grime, and stains from various types of flooring surfaces, including tile, laminate, hardwood, vinyl, and more. Its powerful formula penetrates deep into the surface, lifting away even the toughest dirt and leaving behind a streak-free shine.

VERSATILE CLEANING: It can be used in both residential and commercial settings, making it a convenient choice for homeowners, office managers, and janitorial staff. Whether you need to clean the kitchen floor, bathroom tiles, or office lobby, this cleaner is up to the task.

SAFE FOR THE ENVIRONMENT: In addition to its cleaning prowess, this all-purpose cleaner is also environmentally friendly. It is made with biodegradable ingredients, ensuring that it is safe for both your family and the planet. The lemon scent is derived from natural sources, providing a refreshing aroma without the use of harsh chemicals.

EASY TO USE: Our recommended dilution is 10:1 for all uses. Apply the solution to the desired surface using a mop, sponge, or cloth, and then rinse or wipe away the excess. For stubborn stains, you may need to let the cleaner sit for a few minutes before scrubbing lightly.
description: Product description The Lemon Floor All Purpose Cleaner is a highly effective cleaning solution specially formulated to tackle a wide range of cleaning tasks. With its refreshing lemon scent, this cleaner not only leaves your floors sparkling clean but also imparts a pleasant fragrance throughout your home or workspace. This all-purpose cleaner is designed to remove dirt, grime, and stains from various types of flooring surfaces, including tile, laminate, hardwood, vinyl, and more. Its powerful formula penetrates deep into the surface, lifting away even the toughest dirt and leaving behind a streak-free shine. One of the key features of the Lemon Floor All Purpose Cleaner is its versatility. It can be used in both residential and commercial settings, making it a convenient choice for homeowners, office managers, and janitorial staff. Whether you need to clean the kitchen floor, bathroom tiles, or office lobby, this cleaner is up to the task. In addition to its cleaning prowess, this all-purpose cleaner is also environmentally friendly. It is made with biodegradable ingredients, ensuring that it is safe for both your family and the planet. The lemon scent is derived from natural sources, providing a refreshing aroma without the use of harsh chemicals. To use the Lemon Floor All Purpose Cleaner, simply dilute it with water according to the instructions on the packaging. Apply the solution to the desired surface using a mop, sponge, or cloth, and then rinse or wipe away the excess. For stubborn stains, you may need to let the cleaner sit for a few minutes before scrubbing lightly. With its powerful cleaning abilities, refreshing lemon scent, and eco-friendly formulation, the Lemon Floor All Purpose Cleaner is a must-have for anyone looking to maintain clean and fresh-smelling floors. Say goodbye to dirt and grime and hello to a cleaner, healthier living or working environment. Ingredients Lemon
